package router

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for route_groups_created_inside_handlers
// Anti-pattern: Route groups are created inside a handler at request time instead of at startup.
func HandleDynamicRoutes(c *gin.Context) {
	// Anti-pattern: creating route groups inside a handler
	v1 := c.Group("/api/v1")
	{
		v1.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"users": []string{}})
		})
		v1.POST("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": 1})
		})
	}

	v2 := c.Group("/api/v2")
	{
		v2.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"users": []string{}, "version": "v2"})
		})
	}

	admin := c.Group("/admin")
	{
		admin.GET("/dashboard", func(c *gin.Context) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"dashboard": true})
		})
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "routes registered dynamically"})
}
